name: Rogue Orbit
short_description: Time is your currency and challenge. Every run offers new power-ups, with choices that shape your journey. Unlock more as you play, all set in a visually dynamic, arcade-inspired space roguelite.
detailed_description:
In Rogue Orbit, time is both your enemy and ally. 

Each stage offers the chance to buy power-ups, shaping a unique gameplay experience with every run. Use the time you've earned to select different power-ups, each choice impacting your journey. When the clock runs out, time's up.

Unlock new tiers of power-ups through repeated play, enhancing the depth and replayability of each run into this arcade-inspired space humble roguelite.

Main Features

  • Time is a critical resource: Manage it wisely by destroying enemies and choosing power-ups. Don't get too greedy!

  • Varied runs: Different power-ups available in each playthrough allow for diverse strategies.

  • Unlockable power-up tiers: Repeated play unlocks more options, adding variety to your game.

There is no escape, just a higher score

This game is still in Active Development!
